design_direction: LeadSquared-inspired Enterprise CRM. High-contrast, dense data presentation, premium enterprise aesthetics, distinctive deep purple brand color, dark sidebar with light main content area for the dashboard, and a rich, deep-gradient hero section for the marketing page.

hero.style: Center-aligned, massive H1 text (text-5xl to text-7xl), Framer Motion rotating words ('sales teams', 'marketing teams', 'admission teams'). Rich deep purple/indigo background blobs or gradients. Trust logos positioned right below.

features.style: Apple-style Bento Grid. Cards with subtle 1px borders, off-white or white backgrounds, and a high-contrast deep purple icon. Hover lift and shadow effect.

testimonials.style: Horizontal carousel or bento-style layout. High-quality avatar photos. Real names and institutions.

industry_tabs.style: Horizontal pills or underlined tabs to switch between 'Schools', 'Universities', 'Coaching'. The active tab shows a specific image and features.

layout.style: Dark sidebar (#0F172A) with white text/icons. Main content area is Light (#F8FAFC) with White cards (#FFFFFF). Top header has a white background and subtle bottom border.

cards.style: Crisp, flat white cards with subtle border (#E2E8F0) and very soft shadow (shadow-sm). Use tight padding (p-4 to p-6) for density.

tables.style: Dense, highly scannable. Small text (text-sm). Right-aligned numbers. Badge components for statuses (e.g., Lead Status). Clickable rows that open a right-side Shadcn Sheet for details.

charts.style: Recharts with primary color (#5B3CC4) and distinct secondary colors. Avoid default colors. Maintain clean tooltips.

instructions_to_main_agent.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid="login-submit-button").
instructions_to_main_agent.font_setup: Update index.css and tailwind.config.js to import and use 'Sora' for headings and 'Plus Jakarta Sans' for sans/body.
instructions_to_main_agent.animations: Use 'framer-motion' for the marketing page hero text rotation, card hovers, and tab transitions.
instructions_to_main_agent.sidebar: Ensure the DashboardLayout.jsx component uses a dark slate background for the Sidebar with white/gray text for links, and white background for the main topbar.
